coupon.source_phrase_block: Digital pass admits up to 4 visitors at half-price admission. General admission rates are $24.00 per person. Infants under one year old are free. Online timed-tickets must be purchased in advance at the Children’s Museum website. Be sure to reserve “Half Price Library Timed Tickets” under the “Discount Programs” section at www.bostonchildrensmuseum.org/ticketing. Upon arrival at the museum, you will have to show your tickets and library pass for admission. The date on the pass must match the date of your visit. You may print the attached pass at home, display it on your smartphone, or pick up a printed copy at the library. *Please note that the Boston Children's Museum's hours are subject to change. Please check the official website for all updates: bostonchildrensmuseum.org . This pass is generously sponsored by the Family Friends of the Billerica Public Library.
